name: Mama's Italian Meatloaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first eleven ingredients together. Reserve 1/4 cup of pizza sauce.
2. On a large sheet of wax paper, pat the meat into a 10 x 13-inch rectangle.
3. Arrange ham on top of the meat mixture, leaving a small margin.
4. Spread mushrooms over the ham.
5. Sprinkle cheese over all. Reserve a small amount of cheese.
6. Start at the 10-inch end and roll the meat like a jelly roll. Use wax paper to lift.
7. When rolled tightly, seal edges. Place seam side down in a 9 x 13-inch pan.
8. Brush with reserved pizza sauce.
9. Bake for 1 1/4 hours at 375 degrees. Before done, sprinkle reserved cheese over and finish baking.
10. Serves 10 to 12.
